title: Fix Inability to Edit Object Descriptions in Edit Panel
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to edit object descriptions through the edit panel, so that I can update my documentation without workarounds.
description: After adding descriptions to objects, opening the edit panel did not allow modifying those descriptions. The description field was either read-only or not properly populated in the edit view.
acceptance_criteria: Object descriptions are editable in the edit panel
Existing descriptions are displayed and can be modified
ux_changes: Edit panel now correctly renders and allows modification of object descriptions.
middleware_changes: Fixed description field binding in the edit panel.
